subcodes.first_line: Remember Thou My handmaiden whom God hath manifested in His days, that she might inhale the fragrances of her Lord, the All-Merciful, from the direction of the Ridván [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ذکری امتی التی اظهرها الله فی ایامه لتجد نفحات ربها الرحمن عن شطر الرضوان و
subcodes.subjects: @praise and encouragement, @detachment; severance; renunciation; patience, @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God, @naming of children; of individuals, @suffering and imprisonment
